===[[Pokémon Masters EX]]===
Opal is mentioned in the [[Academy Founding Chapter]] event [[The Bratty Mechanic]] by {{mas|Bede}}, who refers to her as a "quiz-happy old lady" when reminiscing on his training in Galar. Opal made her debut as an NPC in the [[story event]] [[Bede and Marnie's Pursuits]].
